name: Rasta Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta and set aside.
2. Heat oil over medium heat. Add onion, garlic, ginger, and chile pepper; sauté 4-5 minutes.
3. Add pumpkin and water to the pan. Cook for 15-20 minutes until tender. Stir in coconut milk, coriander, cumin, thyme, white pepper, nutmeg, allspice, and salt. Simmer another 4-5 minutes.
4. Process mixture in a food processor until smooth.
5. Heat remaining oil and add bell pepper, mushrooms, and zucchini. Sauté for 5 minutes.
6. Add corn and broccoli. Continue sautéing for 2 minutes.
7. Pour pumpkin sauce into the skillet and stir. Bring to a simmer. Cook for 1 minute before adding pasta. Serve hot.
